channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ganduje clarifies Supreme Court and Gov Yusuf will decide Kano Emirship
item.description: Former Kano state Governor, Dr Abdullahi Umar Ganduje don yan say make only the Supreme Court fit decide the matter of Muhammadu Sanusi II as Emir of Kano. He talk say any decision wey go come must be...

item.title: GEO Group CEO Criticizes Lawsuits Over Immigration Detention Conditions Amid Reports of Inhumane Treatment
item.description: GEO Group CEO George Zoley sparked controversy during a quarterly earnings call by calling ongoing lawsuits over conditions in immigration detention facilities 'fundamentally unconstitutional.' GEO Gr...

item.title: U.S. House Committee Questions Lutnick on Epstein Connections Amid Political Divisions
item.description: U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick testified before the House Oversight Committee regarding his interactions with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Lutnick attempted to clarify his contact w...

item.title: Pirates Edge Closer to Premiership Title After Sundowns Draw with Chiefs
item.description: Orlando Pirates are in a strong position to claim the Betway Premiership this season after Mamelodi Sundowns, reduced to ten men, were held to a 1-1 draw by Kaizer Chiefs at Loftus Versfeld on Wednesd...

item.title: JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith Celebrate Debut Film Experience
item.description: Actors JM Ibarra and Fyang Smith expressed their pride and excitement over their first film together, marking an important milestone in their careers. Both young talents shared that the project was no...

item.title: Decline in Sydney’s Artist Population and Cultural Diversity
item.description: Between 2011 and 2021, Greater Sydney saw a 17% decline in professional artists, writers, musicians and performers, despite overall employment rising by 20%. Unlike other Australian capital cities, wh...

item.title: Vandalism at TMC Office in Kolkata’s New Market Following West Bengal Election Results
item.description: In Kolkata’s New Market area, several structures including a Trinamool Congress (TMC) office were vandalised by a mob reportedly carrying Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) flags. Social media videos show t...

item.title: Federal and Local Authorities Raid MacArthur Park to Disrupt Open-Air Drug Activity
item.description: Federal and local law enforcement agencies conducted a coordinated operation at MacArthur Park in Los Angeles targeting what authorities described as an 'open-air drug market.' The sweep involved doze...

item.title: Canberra's Active Transport Plans Face Delays Amid Public Frustration
item.description: A recent social media announcement by the ACT government claimed construction had begun on the final stage of a cycleway in Braddon, but the promised work had not yet started, sparking criticism. Whil...

item.title: Nairobi Football Fan Loses Electronics During Nighttime Home Robbery
item.description: A Kenyan football fan and entrepreneur, Robert, popularly known as Prezzo, is nursing heavy losses after thieves raided his home in Karasani, Nairobi, on the night of May 5, 2026. The incident occurre...

item.title: PSG Secure Spot in Champions League Final After Draw with Bayern Munich
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain don waka enter Champions League final as dem draw 1-1 with Bayern Munich for Allianz Arena, which take give dem 6-5 overall win after di first-leg 5-4 win for Paris. PSG no waste t...

item.title: Top Unlimited Internet Plans in Nigeria for 2026 and Their Prices
item.description: For 2026, Nigerians dey need better internet pass before, especially with 5G expansion and more people dey work from home or do tech jobs wey require strong connection. Dis article compare the best un...

item.title: Ola Aina Injury Worries Forest Ahead of Europa League, Bonfrere Criticises Simeone Over Lookman Substitution
item.description: Nottingham Forest dey face wahala as their defender, Ola Aina, fit no ready for the Thursday UEFA Europa League semi-final second leg against Aston Villa. Aina wey pick injury last week first leg miss...

item.title: Celebrating Milestone Birthdays with Solo Weddings
item.description: For many single women, turning 40 is a significant milestone deserving more than just a standard birthday party. Increasingly, women are choosing to mark this occasion with a wedding ceremony, even wi...

item.title: Family of Former Kericho Governor Seeks Funds for Urgent Medical Treatment Abroad
item.description: Prof Paul Chepkwony, the first governor of Kericho County, has been battling health issues for the past three years following a stroke. His condition now requires specialised treatment abroad in India...

item.title: Nigel Farage's Income and Financial Activities Since Entering Parliament
item.description: Since being elected as an MP for Clacton, Nigel Farage has amassed an estimated £2 million in income beyond his parliamentary salary. The funds come from a combination of speaking engagements, media w...

item.title: FDA Blocks Publication of Certain Studies on Covid and Shingles Vaccine Safety
item.description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration recently blocked the publication of several studies that supported the safety of Covid-19 and shingles vaccines. According to a Health and Human Services (HHS) sp...

item.title: Chinese Automakers Target Overseas Growth with Region-Specific Models
item.description: Chinese carmakers are making a concerted push to expand into overseas markets, aiming for what industry experts call a 'Yaris moment' – a breakthrough that secures significant foreign market share. Pr...

item.title: Understanding the Purpose and History of the Met Gala
item.description: The Met Gala, widely recognized for its extravagant fashion displays and red carpet glamour, actually began with a clear philanthropic purpose. Established in 1948, the gala was created to raise funds...

item.title: Charlene Ruto Showcases Dance Moves at Youth Event
item.description: Charlene Chelagat Ruto, daughter of President William Ruto, has once again captured public attention after a video of her dancing at a youth event went viral. In the clip, Charlene is seen confidently...
